sigWerErrors.reason: Difference is only in capitalization, which does not affect meaning in Vietnamese.
'hạn mức thẻ tín dụng' (credit card limit) is replaced with 'hệ mục tiêu' (system target), which completely changes the meaning of the sentence.
'tín dụng' (credit) is missing, which removes the reference to credit and makes the sentence incoherent in the context of credit cards.
